SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.models

Class DeviceEvent

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.DeviceEvent
public class DeviceEvent extends Object
Represents an event emitted by an input-type edge device (e.g., motion sensor, doorbell, light sensor). Events are published to the TopicType.EVENT topic and consumed by the Automation Hub, which evaluates them against active automation rules.

Optional metadata (e.g., motion intensity, light level readings) is stored in the metadata map.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DeviceEvent(String sourceDeviceId, DeviceType sourceDeviceType, String eventType)
    Constructs a new DeviceEvent with no additional metadata.
    DeviceEvent(String sourceDeviceId, DeviceType sourceDeviceType, String eventType, Map<String,String> metadata)
    Constructs a new DeviceEvent with additional metadata.

  • Constructor Details

    • DeviceEvent

      public DeviceEvent(String sourceDeviceId, DeviceType sourceDeviceType, String eventType)
      Constructs a new DeviceEvent with no additional metadata.
      Parameters:
      sourceDeviceId - the ID of the device that triggered the event
      sourceDeviceType - the type of device that triggered the event
      eventType - a short string identifying the kind of event

    • DeviceEvent

      public DeviceEvent(String sourceDeviceId, DeviceType sourceDeviceType, String eventType, Map<String,String> metadata)
      Constructs a new DeviceEvent with additional metadata.
      Parameters:
      sourceDeviceId - the ID of the device that triggered the event
      sourceDeviceType - the type of device that triggered the event
      eventType - a short string identifying the kind of event
      metadata - additional key-value data associated with the event

  • Method Details

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns:
      the unique ID of this event

    • getSourceDeviceId

      public String getSourceDeviceId()
      Returns:
      the ID of the source device

    • getSourceDeviceType

      public DeviceType getSourceDeviceType()
      Returns:
      the type of the source device

    • getEventType

      public String getEventType()
      Returns:
      a short string identifying the event type

    • getTimestamp

      public Instant getTimestamp()
      Returns:
      the time at which this event was created

    • getMetadata

      public Map<String,String> getMetadata()
      Returns:
      additional metadata, may be empty
